name: wt-cli
description: Global worktree CLI for managing git worktrees

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --target=node --outfile dist/wt.js && chmod +x dist/wt.js && go build -o dist/wt-go ./cmd/wt-go
scripts.build:ts: bun build src/index.ts --target=node --outfile dist/wt.js && chmod +x dist/wt.js
